faqs.question: What deal options are available for Round Trip Ferry Tickets on the Catalina Flyer?
faqs.answer: Two options are available: a Round-Trip Boat Ride to Catalina Island valid Monday through Friday, and a Round-Trip Boat Ride to Catalina Island valid any day of the week. Both options cover travel to and from Catalina Island.

faqs.question: Where does The Catalina Flyer depart from in Newport Beach?
faqs.answer: The Catalina Flyer departs from 400 Main Street in Newport Beach, CA 92661. This is the designated redemption location for round trip ferry tickets on this route.

faqs.question: What is the difference between the Monday–Friday and any-day ticket options on The Catalina Flyer?
faqs.answer: The Monday–Friday option restricts travel to weekdays only, while the any-day option allows passengers to travel on any day of the week, including weekends. Both are round-trip tickets to Catalina Island departing from Newport Beach.

faqs.question: Are there any onboard features passengers can expect on The Catalina Flyer?
faqs.answer: The Catalina Flyer has large TV screens onboard that are visible to passengers during the journey. This has been noted by multiple customers who have traveled on the ferry.

images.quality_assessment: Good quantity with 53 images total, but alt text quality is mixed. Primary images use descriptive, SEO-optimized alt text ('Catalina Island Ferry Tickets Deals - Round Trip Discount from Newport Beach - Save Up to 44% - Primary Image' through Image 6), and functional images ('Selling Fast Icon', 'Redemption locations map') are properly labeled. However, user-generated content images are generic ('Photo from reviewer') lacking specific descriptive context. Includes related deal thumbnails which provide context.

reviews.text: Need to buy for each person with voucher one by one. Confirm the availability at the vendor side first. Other than that, very easy to redeem. Great value! The ferry boat is quite large. Waiver signing is done beforehand. Check in is straight forward. The reminder message with link to the ticket code is very helpful. Parking is also easy at nearby lot. Recommend to arrive a bit early to board. Read
reviews.author: Rui

reviews.text: Super recomendado telo recomiendo pagar la motad del precio regular no tiene precio
reviews.author: Gloria

reviews.text: Great experience for my family. We saw dolphins on our way to Catalina 🤩
reviews.author: Elsa

reviews.text: This was my first trip to Catalina Island. The Groupon made it a really great value. The boat was well-run by the crew. There were big TV screens onboard to help the time go by. We got a window seat on the way back and the crew pointed out dolphin and whale sightings which made the ride even more special. Overall a really good deal. Would definitely buy again. Read More
reviews.author: Liezel
